description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push. The workflow consists of two jobs: pre-commit and pytest. The pre-commit job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.8, and runs pre-commit checks. The pytest job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of Python versions and optional MPI, caches conda environments, installs dependencies, and runs pytest tests with coverage and codecov reporting.
